title: Vulkanium
description: Vulkanium is a modpack that uses Vulkan instead of OpenGL. It is similar in functionality to Optifine but much faster.
body:
# Important

If your game is crashing with error `java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Out of stack space.` add this to your java arguments `-Dorg.lwjgl.system.stackSize=256`

# 📌 About the Modpack

This modpack is designed to enhance Minecraft’s performance and visuals without changing the core gameplay experience. It focuses on optimization, smooth performance, and compatibility with many OptiFine-like features - all while keeping your game feeling vanilla.

# ⚙️ Key Features

- Performance Optimization: Experience higher FPS, reduced stutter, and smoother gameplay through a curated selection of performance mods.

- OptiFine Feature Support: Enjoy popular features such as connected textures, zoom, and custom sky support - all without needing OptiFine itself.

- Lightweight & Stable: Built for both low-end and high-end systems, ensuring stability across a wide range of hardware.

- Vanilla-Friendly: Keeps the classic Minecraft look and feel - no unnecessary gameplay changes, just a better experience.

# 💡 Why Choose This Modpack?

If you love the look and feel of vanilla Minecraft but want better performance and modern visual features, this modpack is perfect for you.
